Title: Design tokens & typography
Goal: One shared theme layer matching v4
Changes: CSS variables (bg/surface/text/muted/border/accent); DM Serif Display + Inter; hairline borders; no gradients
DoD: Tokens available app-wide; one page restyled to prove it

Title: Appearance switcher (optional)
Goal: Light/dark + accent as a real preference
Changes: Port v4 switcher (vars from MODES+ACC); default Forest/light; Settings > Appearance
Data: Persist theme_mode + accent on profile (or cookie)
DoD: Toggling recolours whole app; choice persists

Title: Copy & positioning pass
Goal: Adopt the 'you hold half' story everywhere
Changes: codes/locations/last-words framing; 'store the PIN not the phone'; legal/will notice; 'Records' not 'Secrets'
DoD: No screen implies password-manager or legal will

Title: Language / i18n cleanup
Goal: Language is a setting not a mid-flow choice
Changes: Remove LanguageSwitcher from login+register; auto-detect>EN; Settings>Language; quiet footer switcher only
DoD: Signup/login show no language UI; changeable in Settings

Title: Record types + additive fields
Goal: New record types and per-record fields v4 needs
DependsOn: Records can carry hint/folder/release-rule; new types selectable

Title: Records home
Goal: Vault explains itself at a glance
Changes: Status summary; gap nudge; plain-language status pills; always-visible actions; folder chips w/ counts
Data: Will reach N=accepted trustees assigned; No trustee=unassigned; Needs master password=PBKDF2-locked

Title: Add a record (2-step)
Changes: Step1 type+name+secret(+Advanced: encryption+release); Step2 who-receives (pick or invite); stepper
Data: Writes record (default Standard/inactivity); Step2 creates assignment; new person=pending invite
DoD: Matches v4/add-record + step2; defaults applied silently

Title: Edit a record
Goal: One place to change anything per record
Changes: Editable name; reveal/edit secret; hint; folder; encryption override; release rule; trustees; delete (no expiry/view-limit)
Data: Per-record encryption override; hint/folder/release_rule from T0.5
DoD: Matches v4/secret-detail; opened from a record row

Title: Onboarding / Welcome
Goal: Teach the model then add first record
Changes: Two-halves explainer + example bank (Access/Find/Irreplaceable) > CTA into Add

Title: Trustees
Changes: Per-person 'will receive N'; reassurance; Active vs Invited; gap nudge; confirm-once

Title: Check-in (heartbeat)
Goal: Make the dead-man switch reassuring and concrete
Changes: 'You're checked in'; 'what if I stop?' w/ exact release date; schedule; history; 'I'm OK'

Title: Trustee view (released)
Changes: 'X's vault is open to you'; owner hints/notes; reveal each record; take-your-time guidance
Data: Only assigned records after release; decrypt on reveal

Title: Settings
Goal: Account defaults + lifecycle in one place
Changes: Account; default encryption; Release&activation; Appearance; Language; danger zone
Data: Account-level defaults; release window + check-in cadence

Title: Landing
Changes: Hero 'half they'll need'; two-halves; what people leave; legal+will notice

Title: Investor page (optional)
Changes: Port v4 investor content; fill real figures (raise/traction/market/pricing/contact)

Title: Polish & QA
Changes: Demo-account run-through; mobile pass; empty/error/loading; a11y; remove old Secrets/Password + auth language copy
